log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:16+3=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Astral Elf — Iron Concentration with Greatclub: [d20:12+6=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 53/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Astral Elf — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:10+9=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 33 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 20/67
Frost Giant attacks Astral Elf — Iron Concentration with Greataxe: [d20:7+9=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 3/67
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Astral Elf — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Astral Elf — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Astral Elf — Iron Concentration.
→ Astral Elf — Iron Concentration healed for 6 HP. HP: 9/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Astral Elf — Iron Concentration with Greatclub: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Astral Elf — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
